description: Reference-program registry. Drives two consumers: (1) build-test-runner-service, which uses programId + expectedOutputPath + classification + knownDivergenceAtW0 to reproduce/compare outputs, and (2) c2c-bff, which surfaces reference programs to the c2c-ui. Each entry carries an explicit reference-program support contract (Issue #94): supportedInProductMode gates whether the UI may run the program through the real product path; w0Subset, oracleMode, and knownLimitations describe what is proven. Entries with classification 'true' are recompiled with cobc and re-executed with cobcrun by the build-test runner when output comparison is enabled.

entries.title: Branch approval guard
entries.rationale: Expected output was reproduced from corpus/synthetic/programs/branch-account-guard.cbl with GnuCOBOL cobc -m and cobcrun BRNCH01.

entries.title: Arithmetic adjustment ledger
entries.rationale: Synthetic expected output now matches generated Java for the W0 MOVE/SUBTRACT/MULTIPLY/DIVIDE/DISPLAY subset.

entries.title: Control decimal payroll
entries.rationale: Synthetic expected output now matches generated Java for the W0 COMPUTE/IF/DISPLAY subset using fixed-point HALF_EVEN rescale semantics.

entries.title: Decimal batch aggregator
entries.rationale: Synthetic expected output now matches generated Java for the W0 PERFORM/COMPUTE/ADD/DISPLAY subset.
